title: Notifications
description: Manage reminders and notifications across every tool and module.

globalMaster.label: Notifications enabled
globalMaster.hint: When off, all preferences below are paused. Your saved schedules are kept and will resume when you turn this back on.

perTargetMaster.label: Enable reminders
perTargetMaster.hint: Turns every reminder for this section on or off.

comingSoon.hint: Reminders for this tool aren't available yet.

cbt.title: Quiet CBT check-in
cbt.body: Take a minute to notice a thought and respond to it with more balance.

act.title: Quiet ACT check-in
act.body: Notice an unhelpful thought and unhook from it. A small practice goes a long way.

meditation.title: Quiet meditation reminder
meditation.body: Take a few minutes to settle the attention. Even a short sit counts.

mood.title: Quiet mood check-in
mood.body: Take a few seconds to note how you're feeling right now.

journal.title: Time to journal
journal.body: A few lines about your day can help you make sense of it.

gratitude.title: A moment of gratitude
gratitude.body: What's one small thing you're grateful for today?

grounding.title: Take a grounding moment
grounding.body: Pause and reconnect with your senses for a minute.

breathing.title: Time to breathe
breathing.body: A short breathing break can settle your body and mind.

sleep.title: Wind down for sleep
sleep.body: Log how you slept and ease into a restful night.

habits.title: Habit check-in
habits.body: A quick look at your habits keeps your momentum going.

act.label: ACT
act.description: Reminders for defusion, values, and committed action.

gratitude.label: Gratitude log
gratitude.description: Reminders to capture a moment of gratitude.

journal.label: Journal
journal.description: Reminders to write a journal entry.
